summary: No GitHub mutations planned. #88807 is the merged canonical PR for the shared plugin-factory failure area, but #88936 has hydrated evidence of a distinct all-failing factory behavior change, so the fixed-by-candidate closeout is not safe without maintainer judgment.

actions.reason: The open draft is related to the merged canonical, but the artifact shows a distinct all-failing factory behavior change. Closing as fixed by #88807 would risk losing a maintainer/product decision.
Already closed linked context, not part of the #88936 fixed-by-#88807 closeout decision.
